scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/lona && npm run build -w packages/lona-geom && npm run build -w packages/lona-curves
scripts.watch: npm run build && concurrently -n lona,lona-geom,lona-curves -c blue,green,magenta "npm run watch -w packages/lona" "npm run watch -w packages/lona-geom" "npm run watch -w packages/lona-curves"
